title: Taco Tuesday & Lunch-Special Meta Ad Photo-Asset Prep — Retouch, Grade, Cutout, Multi-Ratio reframe-crop & Delivery Pack for a West Palm Beach Mexican Restaurant
one_line_ask: Prep and deliver the campaign-ready photo + brand asset pack (retouched, warm/bold-graded hero food shots, color-splash and subject-pop scroll-stop variants, cut-out dishes, three Meta ad ratios via reframe-crop, a licensed backdrop texture, and a vectorized logo) for a West Palm Beach Mexican restaurant's Taco Tuesday & Lunch-Special Meta ad mockups.

issues: Wordmark is not strongly hand-lettered; feels more like a bold sans-serif font.
Letter spacing and alignment could be more organic for a 'hand-crafted neighborhood feel.'
Sombrero and chili pepper emblem is simple but could be more stylized for uniqueness.
Minor visible compression artifacts, but acceptable for a client-supplied PNG.
Palette is correct but could be warmer for 'terracotta-red.'
Slight luminance/compression artifacts in transparent background checkerboard area (acceptable for source PNG)
Sombrero and chili pepper emblem is small relative to wordmark but compositionally acceptable
Font has a slightly digital/clean feel rather than fully hand-lettered, but meets brief requirements
No visible steam rising from meat (minor — could be timing of shot)
Tilt is minimal/nearly imperceptible — leaves less auto-straighten work than brief specifies (~1-2deg rather than ~4deg)
Table surface is very clean — brief calls for minor crumbs present
Molcajete salsa cup appears twice (one stone on plate, one ceramic off-plate to upper right) which is slightly redundant but not incorrect
Lime wedges are uncut halves rather than classic wedge cuts — minor authenticity note
Very slight warm color cast on plate edges — minor, within acceptable range for designer correction
Refried beans texture appears slightly smooth/uniform but still photorealistic
No visible steam, though this is a minor omission for a static phone shot
Two sauces in background cups slightly draw eye but do not compromise subject clarity
Slight warm color cast overall — designer should neutralize for print-safe output
Guacamole bowl sits slightly deep in frame and could benefit from a touch of dodging to lift shadow detail
Salsa bowl is partially cropped at right edge — minor composition note for designer to consider when placing in layout
Textile runner pattern is slightly busy and may compete with type overlays — designer should account for this in comp
